details: Core fields should be present for each loaded app snapshot. Rating and size are excluded because missing values are analytically meaningful.
recommendation: Investigate rows with missing core fields before loading the DW fact table.

details: Rating can be missing in the source dataset. It should not be blindly imputed because it is an analytical measure.
recommendation: Preserve NULL rating and create rating_missing_flag during cleaning.

details: Size is NULL when the raw value is missing or equal to "Varies with device". This is meaningful source information.
recommendation: Preserve NULL size and create size_missing_or_varies_flag during cleaning.

details: App type should usually be Free or Paid. Missing type should be flagged instead of guessed.
recommendation: Create app_type_missing_flag. Do not infer Free/Paid unless a documented business rule is approved.

details: Current version is descriptive metadata and may be missing for some apps.
recommendation: Preserve missing value and optionally flag it for metadata-quality analysis.

details: Android version is descriptive metadata and may be missing or vary across devices.
recommendation: Preserve missing value and optionally flag it for metadata-quality analysis.

details: Each raw row should generate at most one reconciled app snapshot.
recommendation: If duplicates exist, inspect ETL joins and source row identifiers.

details: Normalized app names should be unique in the app master table.
recommendation: If duplicates exist, improve normalization rules.

details: Each snapshot-genre pair should appear only once.
recommendation: If duplicates exist, deduplicate the bridge table before DW loading.

details: Rating must be between 0 and 5.
recommendation: Invalid ratings should be set to NULL and logged during cleaning.

details: Review count cannot be negative.
recommendation: Invalid review counts should be investigated and nullified if needed.

details: Install count cannot be negative.
recommendation: Invalid install counts should be investigated and nullified if needed.

details: Price cannot be negative.
recommendation: Invalid prices should be set to NULL or corrected from source if possible.

details: Application size in bytes cannot be negative.
recommendation: Invalid sizes should be set to NULL and logged.

details: Domain tables should not contain shifted row values or textual null markers.
recommendation: If issues exist, fix domain-load filters and rerun the reconciled load.

details: Free apps should have price 0. Paid apps should usually have price greater than 0.
recommendation: Rows with Type/Price conflicts should be flagged and inspected.

details: Each snapshot should have at least one genre according to the source dataset.
recommendation: If missing, inspect raw Genres and bridge ETL.

details: Bridge rows must reference existing snapshots and existing genres.
recommendation: Orphan bridge rows must be removed before DW loading.

details: Last updated date should not be in the future.
recommendation: Future dates should be corrected if source evidence exists, otherwise nullified and logged.

details: Last updated date supports the time dimension and should be present.
recommendation: Missing update dates must be investigated before DW loading.

details: Accuracy cannot be fully verified without an external trusted source such as current Google Play Store metadata.
recommendation: Document this limitation. Use validity, consistency, and outlier checks as internal proxies only.
